title: ジャパンCの後に・運命を越えて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fierce battle between Sakura Chiyono O and
Maruzensky stirs the crowd into a broiling frenzy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And the racers themselves are just as impassioned
by their battle. They realize how inspiring it is to
have a rival, and how badly they don't want to
lose.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Shining tears spill from Maruzensky's eyes—proof
that she ran with everything she had.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them make a new promise—to race
together again... as rivals.
